name: MYOB
description: MYOB is an Australian business management platform providing REST APIs for accounting and business operations. The MYOB Business API enables integrations with invoices, bills, contacts, accounts, payroll, tax codes, banking, and financial reporting for small and medium-sized businesses across Australia and New Zealand.

mainEntityOfPage.name: MYOB Developer Portal
mainEntityOfPage.description: Developer documentation and API reference for MYOB Business API

itemListElement.name: MYOB Business API
itemListElement.description: REST-based cloud API for MYOB AccountRight, MYOB Essentials, and MYOB Business. Provides endpoints for managing invoices, bills, contacts (customers, suppliers, employees), general ledger accounts, banking transactions, payroll, tax codes, and financial reporting for SMBs in Australia and New Zealand.
